focusPoints.label: Top priorities and what’s changed this cycle.
focusPoints.reason: Whether their current bets and sequencing still match the team’s direction, or whether they’ve quietly drifted into reactive work.

focusPoints.label: Biggest blockers and dependency bottlenecks.
focusPoints.reason: What’s slowing delivery right now, and where you can help remove organizational or decision dependencies before they compound.

focusPoints.label: How well updates and decisions are landing.
focusPoints.reason: How they communicate status and tradeoffs so stakeholders stay aligned without needing extra chasing.

focusPoints.label: What they want more of from you.
focusPoints.reason: If anything is missing—air cover, decisions, context, or coaching—this is the moment to name it so the next two weeks run smoother.

issues: listenFor may lack observable behavioural cue: "if they cite a recent update, decision, or missed handoff as…"
